item.title: Cadence Spikes Post-Earnings With Strong Interest in AI Products
item.description: Cadence Design Systems' latest earnings showed strong top and bottom line growth, and analysts are eyeing considerable upside ahead.

item.title: 3 Under-the-Radar AI Infrastructure Stocks Powering the Next Buildout
item.description: Find three under-the-radar AI infrastructure stocks tied to data center buildouts—land, electricity, and water rights—plus dividends and timelines.

item.title: Lemonade’s Sweet Results Refresh Market Appetite: Rebound Ahead
